page: Microsoft Azure EC128es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEV5 server family. Powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture, this instance features 128 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 6.0 GB per vCPU. The underlying virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration does not include any local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external network-attached storage. The instance is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. Additionally, there are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this virtual machine.

Given its high memory density and large dedicated core count, the EC128es_v5 is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It offers qualitative cost efficiency for resource-heavy applications by consolidating large databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and in-memory analytics engines onto a single high-capacity node, reducing the overhead of multi-node cluster management.
description: Microsoft Azure EC128es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEV5 family, designed for resource-intensive enterprise applications. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features an Intel x86_64 processor with 128 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per core. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is engineered for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, and enterprise resource planning systems that require substantial memory capacity and high compute density without the need for local temporary disks or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC128es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 768 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for large-scale enterprise databases.
